testcase.name: testMercadoriaEndpoint

platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists credenciais cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists documentos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists empresa_mercadorias cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists empresa_servicos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists empresa_telefones cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists empresa_usuarios cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists empresa_vendas cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists empresas cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists enderecos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists mercadorias cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists servicos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists telefones cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists usuario_documentos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists usuario_telefones cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists usuario_tipos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists usuario_veiculos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists usuarios cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists veiculos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists venda_mercadorias cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists venda_servicos cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists vendas cascade Hibernate: create table credenciais ( id bigint generated by default as identity, nome_usuario varchar(255) not null unique, senha varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table documentos ( id bigint generated by default as identity, numero varchar(255) not null unique, tipo varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table empresa_mercadorias ( empresa_id bigint not null, mercadoria_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table empresa_servicos ( empresa_id bigint not null, servico_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table empresa_telefones ( empresa_id bigint not null, telefone_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table empresa_usuarios ( empresa_id bigint not null, usuario_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table empresa_vendas ( empresa_id bigint not null, venda_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table empresas ( endereco_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, cnpj varchar(255) not null unique, nome_fantasia varchar(255) not null, razao_social varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table enderecos ( estado varchar(2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, bairro varchar(255) not null, cidade varchar(255) not null, codigo_postal varchar(255), informacoes_adicionais varchar(255), numero varchar(255) not null, rua varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table mercadorias ( quantidade integer not null, validade date, valor float(53) not null, cadastro timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, descricao varchar(255) not null, fabricante varchar(255) not null, nome varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table servicos ( valor float(53) not null, cadastro timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, descricao varchar(255) not null, nome varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table telefones ( ddd varchar(2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, numero varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table usuario_documentos ( documento_id bigint not null, usuario_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table usuario_telefones ( telefone_id bigint not null, usuario_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table usuario_tipos ( usuario_id bigint not null, perfil varchar(255) check (perfil in ('ADMINISTRADOR','GERENTE','VENDEDOR','CLIENTE')) ) Hibernate: create table usuario_veiculos ( usuario_id bigint not null, veiculo_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table usuarios ( data_nascimento date, credencial_id bigint, data_cadastro timestamp(6), endereco_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, nome varchar(255) not null, nome_social varchar(255), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table veiculos ( id bigint generated by default as identity, ano_fabricacao varchar(255), fabricante varchar(255) not null, modelo varchar(255) not null, placa varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table venda_mercadorias ( mercadoria_id bigint not null, venda_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table venda_servicos ( servico_id bigint not null, venda_id bigint not null ) Hibernate: create table vendas ( cadastro timestamp(6), cliente_id bigint, funcionario_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, veiculo_id bigint, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists empresa_mercadorias add constraint FKoo2wk3w5g3km74ylbycxrqef2 foreign key (mercadoria_id) references mercadorias Hibernate: alter table if exists empresa_mercadorias add constraint FKi2d6yjg0jii072vtod856c4dy foreign key (empresa_id) references empresas Hibernate: alter table if exists Hibernate: select e1_0.id, e1_0.cnpj, e2_0.id, e2_0.bairro, e2_0.cidade, e2_0.codigo_postal, e2_0.estado, e2_0.informacoes_adicionais, e2_0.numero, e2_0.rua, e1_0.nome_fantasia, e1_0.razao_social from empresas e1_0 left join enderecos e2_0 on e2_0.id=e1_0.endereco_id where e1_0.id=? Hibernate: select m1_0.empresa_id, m1_1.id, m1_1.cadastro, m1_1.descricao, m1_1.fabricante, m1_1.nome, m1_1.quantidade, m1_1.validade, m1_1.valor from empresa_mercadorias m1_0 join mercadorias m1_1 on m1_1.id=m1_0.mercadoria_id where m1_0.empresa_id=? Hibernate: select s1_0.empresa_id, s1_1.id, s1_1.cadastro, s1_1.descricao, s1_1.nome, s1_1.valor from empresa_servicos s1_0 join servicos s1_1 on s1_1.id=s1_0.servico_id where s1_0.empresa_id=? Hibernate: select t1_0.empresa_id, t1_1.id, t1_1.ddd, t1_1.numero from empresa_telefones t1_0 join telefones t1_1 on t1_1.id=t1_0.telefone_id where t1_0.empresa_id=? Hibernate: select u1_0.empresa_id, u1_1.id, c1_0.id, c1_0.nome_usuario, c1_0.senha, u1_1.data_cadastro, u1_1.data_nascimento, u1_1.email, e1_0.id, e1_0.bairro, e1_0.cidade, e1_0.codigo_postal, e1_0.estado, e1_0.informacoes_adicionais, e1_0.numero, e1_0.rua, u1_1.nome, u1_1.nome_social from empresa_usuarios u1_0 join usuarios u1_1 on u1_1.id=u1_0.usuario_id left join credenciais c1_0 on c1_0.id=u1_1.credencial_id left join enderecos e1_0 on e1_0.id=u1_1.endereco_id where u1_0.empresa_id=? Hibernate: select v1_0.empresa_id, v1_1.id, v1_1.cadastro, c1_0.id, c2_0.id, c2_0.nome_usuario, c2_0.senha, c1_0.data_cadastro, c1_0.data_nascimento, c1_0.email, e1_0.id, e1_0.bairro, e1_0.cidade, e1_0.codigo_postal, e1_0.estado, e1_0.informacoes_adicionais, e1_0.numero, e1_0.rua, c1_0.nome, c1_0.nome_social, f1_0.id, c3_0.id, c3_0.nome_usuario, c3_0.senha, f1_0.data_cadastro, f1_0.data_nascimento, f1_0.email, e2_0.id, e2_0.bairro, e2_0.cidade, e2_0.codigo_postal, e2_0.estado, e2_0.informacoes_adicionais, e2_0.numero, e2_0.rua, f1_0.nome, f1_0.nome_social, v2_0.id, v2_0.ano_fabricacao, v2_0.fabricante, v2_0.modelo, v2_0.placa from empresa_vendas v1_0 join vendas v1_1 on v1_1.id=v1_0.venda_id left join usuarios c1_0 on c1_0.id=v1_1.cliente_id left join credenciais c2_0 on c2_0.id=c1_0.credencial_id left join enderecos e1_0 on e1_0.id=c1_0.endereco_id left join usuarios f1_0 on f1_0.id=v1_1.funcionario_id left join credenciais c3_0 on c3_0.id=f1_0.credencial_id left join enderecos e2_0 on e2_0.id=f1_0.endereco_id left join veiculos v2_0 on v2_0.id=v1_1.veiculo_id where v1_0.empresa_id=?
